business.name: Juniper Oven
business.summary: A planning guide inspired by neighborhood bakery and cafe. Service and availability details are not confirmed.

audience.primary: Local residents seeking fresh baked goods and a welcoming everyday stop
needs: A clear view of what is available
Easy access to location and hours
Simple ways to ask about orders

offerings.name: Fresh bread
offerings.description: A focused selection of loaves and everyday breads.

offerings.name: Pastries
offerings.description: Sweet and savory pastries for morning visits and afternoon treats.

offerings.name: Seasonal bakes
offerings.description: A changing selection inspired by the season.

brand.voice: Plainspoken, sensory, and welcoming without making unsupported claims.
brand.aesthetic: An editorial bakery style with warm paper tones, deep evergreen type, restrained botanical details, and close views of baked goods.

signatureMove.name: The Oven Window
signatureMove.description: A small oven window illustration gently opens as visitors explore the page and reveals the featured bake while the same information remains visible in text.
signatureMove.touchFallback: A clearly labeled button opens the featured bake panel without hiding any content.
signatureMove.reducedMotion: The oven window appears open as a static illustration with the featured bake already visible.

content.headline: Explore Ideas
content.subheadline: A practical starting point for considering neighborhood bakery and cafe before confirming details with the business.
content.about: Use these notes to clarify priorities, setting, and personal preferences before confirming details.

inferred.label: Primary audience
inferred.value: Local residents seeking fresh baked goods

inferred.label: Offering mix
inferred.value: Fresh bread, pastries, and seasonal bakes
